name: logic_deduction
input: All roses are flowers. All flowers need water. Do roses need water? Answer yes or no.

name: math_word_problem
input: A store has 15 apples. 7 are sold. How many remain? Give just the number.

name: comparison
input: Which is larger: 0.9 or 0.11? Give just the number.

name: negation
input: Is the sky normally green? Answer yes or no.

name: multi_step
input: If x = 3 and y = x + 2, what is y * 2? Give just the number.
